caption: A man with a tall, grey, stylized wig and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a black professional microphone. The background is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and various articles of clothing on hangers, including items with "LEE" visible on the tags. A white bag sits on a shelf behind him. Each frame features a red and white logo on the left and right sides of the screen that reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expression and head posture as if speaking or reacting during a recording. The overall setting remains static, with the only movement being the man's subtle facial transitions across the sequence.
